pages.text: Your $(item)Forest$() seed has learned a new trick. Thrown over one of $(o)Oh The Biomes We've Gone$()'s exotic wood biomes, the island grows in $(bold)that$() biome's trees instead of plain oak.

$(bold)Grow one$()$(br)Stand over a biome like $(o)aspen boreal$(), $(o)maple taiga$(), $(o)cika woods$() or $(o)sakura grove$() and throw a $(item)Forest$() seed — up comes an aspen, maple, cika, or cherry-blossom island. Twenty wood families answer the Forest seed today: aspen, baobab, cika, jacaranda, maple, ebony, redwood, zelkova, witch-hazel, sakura, ironwood, holly, pine, mahogany, spirit, florus, skyris, cypress, rainbow eucalyptus, and the blue-and-green enchanted woods.

$(bold)Keep it forever$()$(br)Chop one tree for its $(item)sapling$(), then replant it anywhere — on any island or in a $(item)Botany Pot$(). One trip to a biome is all it takes to farm its wood for good; the map becomes your lumberyard.
